description: Create an interactive master-detail dashboard in Oracle Analytics Desktop using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset. The dashboard must include a bar chart titled 'Regional Sales Summary' showing Sales by Region and a table titled 'Order Details' showing Customer Name, Order ID, Sales, and Profit. Configure the bar chart to act as a filter for the table and ensure the dashboard is currently filtered to the 'East' region. Save the workbook as 'Regional_Drilldown'.
